case_title: PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP VS. LUIS ARMANDO DZUL COCOM

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,019.30 FILED BY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP AS TO DEFENDANT DZUL COCOM, LUIS ARMANDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00 SERVED AUG-22-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DZUL COCOM, LUIS ARMANDO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2014 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-17-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-17-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ--LEGAL ASSISTANT COLLECTION DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DZUL COCOM, LUIS ARMANDO $1,019.30 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,104.30 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
